sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπαντάω

- Transliteration: Hupantao

- Phonetic: hoop-an-tah'-o

- Definition:

1. to go to meet, to meet

2. in military reference

a. of a hostile meeting

- Origin: from G5259 and a derivative of G473

- TDNT entry: 13:25,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5259 and a derivative of G473; to go opposite (meet) under (quietly) that is to encounter fall in with: - (go to) meet.
